title: Origins: Support
description: Adds 3 Origins that support yourself and/or other players. The Groved is passive, α-02 is utilitarian, and the Soul Weaver is a linking force
body:
### ⚠️ THIS DATAPACK IS ALSO A RESOURCE PACK ⚠️

This datapack adds 3 new origins based on supporting the players around you. The origins support and help in different and interesting ways.
These Origins were meant to be played in multiplayer, but can still be fun in singleplayer.

<details>
<summary>🟢 Groved</summary>

*A being made of flora, protective and a natural helper.*

This origin is meant to be played as a group supporter, helping a large group of players together at once.

> **PRIMARY: Natures Embrace**
> - Press your primary key to heal allies around you for 2.5 hearts.
> - Holding different flowers when using this ability will sacrifice the flower to give a small buff to players around you
> - Cooldown of 30 seconds

> **SECONDARY: Life Blessing**
> - Toggle on and off this ability
> - While on, you will start to bonemeal blocks around you, accelerating plant growth around you in a 4 block radius

> **PASSIVE [+]: Photosynthesis**
> - You will slowly heal over time when in direct sunlight

> **PASSIVE [-]: Flora Fragility**
> - You take 25% more damage from all fire damage
> - You gain slowness when in cold biomes (biomes with temperatures <= 0.5)

> **PASSIVE [-]: Vegetarian**
> - You cannot eat meat, you are stuck eating only vegetables and fruit

</details>


<details>
<summary>🟡🟡 α-02</summary>

*An abandoned automaton created years ago, built to help and serve during a time of peace.*

This origin is meant to be more utilitarian, being a kind of workshop on the go.

> **PASSIVE [=]: Internal Batteries**
> - You no longer need to eat, you are a robot thus you do not need food
> - Your hunger bar is gone, instead you have an energy bar
> - You have 20 total energy points

> **PRIMARY: Fabrication**
> - Be able to use a crafting anywhere, anytime
> - Costs 2 energy points to be opened

> **SECONDARY: Storage Matrix**
> - You have access to a 3x3 storage unit, items inside are kept upon death
> - Costs no energy points

> **TERTIARY (Save Hotbar Activator): Thermal Converter**
> - Smelt items in your main hand
> - Cooldown of 15 seconds per smelt
> - Costs 4 energy points

> **QUATERNARY (Load Hotbar Activator): Seismic Ping**
> - Shows the location of ores around you in a 16 block radius
> - Blocks are shown for 10 seconds
> - Cooldown of 1 minute
> - Costs 7 energy points

> **PASSIVE [+]: Solar Panels**
> - When standing in direct sunlight, slowly recharge your battery
> - When not in direct sunlight, but in light level of 9+ (overworld) or 7+ (nether) battery will recharge 3x slower

> **PASSIVE [+]: Power Hungry**
> - You can eat redstone dust to gain 2 energy points

> **PASSIVE [+]: Self Repair**
> - While at or over 10 energy points, you will slowly heal at a rate of 0.5 hearts/2 seconds

> **PASSIVE [+]: Iron Clad**
> - You have 4 extra armor points

> **PASSIVE [=]: Compact**
> - You are 25% smaller than a regular player

> **PASSIVE [=]: Machine**
> - As a machine, you are inorganic thus you don't regenerate, you don't get insomnia, and you are immune to most health/hunger based potion effects

> **PASSIVE [-]: Short Circuit**
> - You take damage when in bodies of water
> - Rain is perfectly fine

> **PASSIVE [-]: Power Saving Mode**
> - When you reach 0 energy points, you can no longer interact with blocks
> - You move 60% slower

</details>


<details>
<summary>🔴🔴🔴 Soul Weaver</summary>

*An old and protective soul trapped in the land of the living.*

⚠️ You can only have a maximum of 50 Soul Weaver's on a server in total, or else it breaks ⚠️

This origin is meant to be at the backlines, not in the middle of a war, but rather quietly helping out friends from afar.

> **PRIMARY: Soul Link**
> - Link/Unlink the closest player in a 5 block radius
> - You cannot link to players that are linked to another Soul Weaver
> - You cannot link to other Soul Weaver's
> - You can have a maximum of 5 links
> - Of a player you linked to dies, they are still linked.
> - If you die you lose all your links
> - Linked players will have an outline only visible to you
> - Depending on how many links you have, everyone will have a buff, the more links, the stronger the buffs

> **SECONDARY: Soul Recall**
> - Look at one of your linked players in a 100 block radius
> - Activate the ability to teleport that player to you, or if you are shifting, teleport to them
> - Cooldown of 10 seconds

> **TERTIARY (Save Hotbar Activator): Soul Cleanse**
> - Remove all effects from your linked players
> - Linked players will get regneration for 5 seconds. Absorption for 15 seconds
> - Cooldown of 1 minute

> **QUATERNARY (Load Hotbar Activator): Veil of the Beyond**
> - Toggle this ability on and off
> - While toggled on you are completely invisible and can phase through most non-solid blocks
> - While on, you cannot interact with blocks and entities
> - While on, you are much faster
> - You can only have this ability toggled on for a certain amount of time, 5 seconds being the max with a recharge time of 30 seconds + 1 second delay

> **QUINARY (Highlight Players (Spectators)): Echo Sight**
> - All entities around you in a 64 block radius will glow only for you
> - Only entities considered "alive" will be seen. This excludes undead mobs and entities such as minecarts, armor stands, item frames, items, etc.
> - Entities will be seen for 5 seconds
> - Cooldown of 30 seconds

> **PASSIVE [+]: Light Soul**
> - You take no fall damage

> **PASSIVE [-]: Unwoven**
> - When you aren't linked to anyone, you walk 40% slower
> - When you aren't linked to anyone, you mine 30% slower

> **PASSIVE [-]: Unwieldy**
> - You cannot use shields

> **PASSIVE [-]: Fragmented Shell**
> - You have 2 less hearts
> - You deal 40% less damage

> **PASSIVE [=]: No Rest for the Dead**
> - You dont gain insomnia
> - You cannot sleep, but you still set your spawn point

</details>
